title: Generic commercial loan deal schema
description: Version 1.0.0 generic schema for deal-level commercial loan documents that govern multiple facilities or tranches. The schema has a required normalised deal core centred on the borrower group, finance parties and facilities array, with optional concern-specific blocks for acquisition context, commitments, security, covenants, prepayments and other deal mechanics.

percentage.description: Percentage expressed as a percent, not a decimal fraction; for example 5.25 means 5.25%.

source_ref.description: Optional evidence pointer back to the source document.

reference.description: Clause, schedule, section or page reference, preserving document notation where possible.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction of incorporation, organisation or establishment. Include state/province for US, Canadian or Australian entities where available.

hierarchy_note.description: Explanation of why the document is treated as deal-level, typically because it governs multiple facilities or tranches.

obligor_group_core.description: Borrower/obligor group. At least one of company, borrower, borrowers or original_borrowers should be present.

facility_id.description: Document-native tranche/facility label, e.g. Facility A, Facility B2, Original Revolving Facility.

total_commitment.description: Record the commitment in the facility's own currency. Use base_currency_equivalent for translated/base-currency caps.

letters_of_credit_permitted.description: Populate only where the document clearly permits or excludes letters of credit for this facility.

deal_optional_blocks.description: Concern-specific deal extensions. Omit blocks that are absent from the source document rather than fabricating values. The core stays focused on deal identity, obligor group, finance parties, facilities and governing law; detailed bank workflow concerns such as syndication allocations, voting, transferability, agency payments, tax gross-up and collateral perfection are optional because they vary by market and transaction.

commitments_by_facility.description: Keys should match core.facilities[].facility_id. Amounts are in the relevant facility currency unless stated otherwise.

base_currency_commitments_by_facility.description: Base-currency equivalents or caps where separately stated.

total_commitments_by_facility.description: Cross-check totals by facility_id, preferably in facility currency.

commitment_currency_note.description: Use to distinguish facility-currency commitments from base-currency caps or equivalents.

guarantee_coverage.description: Narrative or percentage threshold for guarantor coverage.

covenant_clause_ref.description: Point to the clause that defines the covenant, not merely to an Event of Default cross-reference.

source_trace.description: Extraction-level metadata. This block is not a substitute for field-level source_refs where precision matters.

source_text_path.description: Path to extracted readable text used for PDF-grounded extraction, usually produced by extract_pdf_text. Required by validation for pdf_direct/hybrid PDF source documents.

source_text_char_count.description: Character count of the extracted readable source text when available.

syndication_and_allocations.description: Optional front-office/syndication block for arranger, bookrunner, underwriter and lender allocation economics. Kept outside core because many executed facility agreements disclose only final commitments.

trading_transfers_and_assignments.description: Optional secondary-trading block for assignment, transfer, novation and participation restrictions.

threshold.description: Verbatim threshold, e.g. Majority Lenders, all Lenders, 66 2/3%, affected Lenders.

lender_classes_and_voting.description: Optional legal/agency block for lender classes, voting entitlements and consent thresholds.

amendments_and_waivers.description: Optional legal/agency block for amendment, waiver and consent mechanics.

intercreditor_and_subordination.description: Optional legal block for ranking, subordination, intercreditor enforcement and turnover mechanics.

collateral_perfection_timetable.description: Optional security/legal-operations block for closing and post-closing collateral perfection timetables.

covenant_calculation_definitions.description: Optional credit/legal block for complete financial covenant formula extraction.

cash_waterfalls.description: Optional agency/security block for normal-course and enforcement proceeds waterfalls.

tax_gross_up_and_indemnities.description: Optional tax/legal block for gross-up, tax indemnity, FATCA, increased costs and lender tax-status mechanics.

agency_payments_and_settlement.description: Optional agency/operations block for payment routing, settlement and pro-rata distribution mechanics.

undertakings_and_events_full_text.description: Optional legal block for exhaustive representations, undertakings, Events of Default and remedies text.

notice_mechanics.description: Optional operational/legal block for notices, agent communications and electronic delivery.

operational_servicing_calendar.description: Optional operations block converting deal-level and facility-level dates, rules and deadlines into servicing events.
